name: ai-shell-smith
title: AI Shell Smith
description: Create shell commands from natural language descriptions, grounded in your cwd, git context, and live docs.
author: jebraat

commands.name: index
commands.title: AI Shell Smith
commands.subtitle: Convert text to shell commands
commands.description: Create shell commands from natural language descriptions

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Required for OpenAI models. Get yours at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

preferences.name: perplexityApiKey
preferences.title: Perplexity API Key
preferences.description: Required for Perplexity. Get yours at https://www.perplexity.ai/api-platform

preferences.name: context7ApiKey
preferences.title: Context7 API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Fetches up-to-date documentation for better command generation. Get yours at https://context7.com/dashboard

preferences.name: webSearch
preferences.title: Web Search
preferences.label: Use GPT-5 Search (OpenAI only)
preferences.description: Enable web search (uses GPT-5 Search, only for OpenAI)

preferences.name: openaiModel
preferences.title: OpenAI Model
preferences.description: Model to use when OpenAI is selected as provider

preferences.name: openaiUrl
preferences.title: OpenAI URL
preferences.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible endpoints (leave empty for api.openai.com)

preferences.name: openaiModelCustom
preferences.title: OpenAI Custom Model
preferences.description: Override model name when using custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints — takes priority if OpenAI URL is set

preferences.name: ollamaModel
preferences.title: Ollama Model
preferences.description: Model to use when Ollama is selected as provider

preferences.name: ollamaUrl
preferences.title: Ollama URL
preferences.description: Base URL for Ollama API — with or without /v1

preferences.name: ollamaApiKey
preferences.title: Ollama API Key
preferences.description: Optional API key for authenticated Ollama instances

preferences.name: terminal
preferences.title: Terminal Application
preferences.description: Leave empty to auto-detect your default terminal

Actions panel with all available commands
